subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-08-06 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: That which Mírzá Abu'l-Faḍl hath uttered is proven through the exposition in the Aḥsanu'l-Qiṣaṣ, which is the first Book of His Holiness the Exalted One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فرمایشی که میرزا ابوالفضل کرده به بیان ثابت می شود.  در احسن القصص  که کتاب اول حضرت اعلی است
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc.
